---
title: "Empty Document re: Symmetry"
format: html
---

```{r setup}

library(tidyverse)
library(fixest)
library(modelsummary)

```

Using the NTA_data_2024_10_20.csv file made in Panel_Replication_2024_10_11.qmd.

```{r}

df <- read_csv("NTA_data_2024_10_20.csv")

```


# Find Evidence of Asymmetry


# Run model with asymmetric specifications.
